commits.subject: Day 146 (19:04): Add failure relations to state graph projection so --kind failure returns data (Task 1)

eval.reason: The implementation exactly matches the task spec — adds a `FailureObserved | JsonOutputFailure | ToolSchemaFailure` match arm in `project_relations` that creates `tool→failure` graph relations with `dst_kind="failure"`, enabling `state graph hotspots --kind failure` to return data. Build and tests pass, insertion point is correct (after ToolCall block, before task_id loop), and `.skill_evolve_counter` bump is the only collateral change.
